phrases.intent_en: Ask where to board a ferry
phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove si prendono i traghetti per il lago?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh see PREN-doh-noh ee trah-GET-tee per eel LAH-goh?
phrases.cultural_note: Ferries and hydrofoils depart from Piazza Cavour, connecting Como with Bellagio, Varenna and other lakeside villages.

responses.english: From the dock at Piazza Cavour.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the best viewpoint along the promenade is
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, qual è il punto panoramico più bello sul lungolago?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, kwahl eh eel POON-toh pah-noh-RAH-mee-koh PYOO BEL-loh sool loon-goh-LAH-goh?

responses.english: Toward Villa Olmo, on the right.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to rent a rowing boat
phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove si possono noleggiare le barche a remi?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh see pos-SOH-noh noh-lej-JAH-reh leh BAR-keh ah REH-mee?

responses.english: At the jetty near Villa Geno.
responses.phonetic: al pon-TEE-leh vee-CHEE-noh AL-lah VEE-lah JEH-noh.
responses.french: Al pontile vicino alla Villa Geno.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to sit with a coffee and a lake view
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, c'è un bar con vista sul lago?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, cheh oon bar kon VEE-stah sool LAH-goh?

responses.english: Yes, Caffè Sociale, right on the lakefront.
responses.phonetic: see, eel kaf-FEH soh-CHAH-leh, PROH-pryoh sool loon-goh-LAH-goh.
responses.french: Sì, il Caffè Sociale, proprio sul lungolago.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how long the lakefront walk is
phrases.text_local: Scusi, quanto è lungo il percorso sul lungolago?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KWAN-toh eh LOON-goh eel per-KOR-soh sool loon-goh-LAH-goh?

responses.english: About three kilometres to Villa Olmo.
responses.phonetic: CHEER-kah treh kee-loh-MEH-tree FEE-noh ah VEE-lah OL-moh.
responses.french: Circa tre chilometri fino a Villa Olmo.
